title: Transformer Attention Mechanisms
description: System applies various attention strategies within DIT blocks (full, cross, memory-efficient) for multi-view video diffusion transformers.

attention_classes.name: Attention
attention_classes.signature: __init__(dim, num_heads=8, qkv_bias=False, proj_bias=True, attn_drop=0.0, proj_drop=0.0, use_qk_norm=False)
attention_classes.mechanism: Single qkv linear → split Q/K/V → scaled dot-product softmax attention

attention_classes.name: CrossAttention
attention_classes.signature: __init__(dim, num_heads=8, qkv_bias=False, proj_bias=True, attn_drop=0.0, proj_drop=0.0, use_qk_norm=False)
attention_classes.mechanism: Separate to_q(x), to_k(y), to_v(y) projections → scaled dot-product softmax cross-attention

attention_classes.name: MemEffAttentionFlash
attention_classes.mechanism: Inherits Attention layers; overrides forward with flash_attn_func(q, k, v); no explicit softmax
attention_classes.note: Skips manual softmax; supports optional qk_norm

attention_classes.name: MemEffCrossAttentionFlash
attention_classes.forward: forward(q: Tensor, k: Tensor, v: Tensor, attn_bias=None) -> Tensor
attention_classes.mechanism: Pre-split q/k/v tensors → to_q/to_k/to_v projections → flash_attn_func(q, k, v)
attention_classes.note: Accepts externally split q/k/v unlike base CrossAttention which accepts (x, y)

attention_classes.name: MemEffAttentionFlex
attention_classes.signature: __init__(dim, num_heads=8, qkv_bias=False, proj_bias=True, attn_drop=0.0, proj_drop=0.0, flex_attn_block_mask=None, use_qk_norm=False)
attention_classes.mechanism: Single qkv linear → unbind Q/K/V → permute to (B,H,N,D) → flex_attn_func_compiled(q, k, v, block_mask=...)
attention_classes.note: Supports custom sparsity via flex_attn_block_mask; torch.compile for efficiency; independent from Attention class

block_wrappers.name: CrossAttentionBlock
block_wrappers.forward: forward(x: Tensor, y: Tensor) → x + drop_path(attn(norm1(x), y, y)) + drop_path(mlp(norm2(x)))
block_wrappers.note: norm_y(y) applied before passing y as k/v to attn

block_type_mapping.fa / full_attn: full self-attention via VideoAttention (uses TE DotProductAttention backend)

block_wrappers.name: GeneralDITTransformerBlock
block_wrappers.pattern: Parses block_config string (e.g. 'FA-CA-MLP') by splitting on '-' and creating a DITBuildingBlock per token
block_wrappers.forward: forward(x, emb_B_D, crossattn_emb, crossattn_mask, rope_emb_L_1_1_D, adaln_lora_B_3D, extra_per_block_pos_emb)
block_wrappers.extra_pos_emb: added to x before iterating blocks

use_cases.name: Perform Cross-Attention
use_cases.input: x (query source), y (key/value source: context embeddings)

use_cases.name: Apply Flash Attention Backend
use_cases.trigger: Default when Flash Attention library is available
use_cases.benefit: Memory-efficient, fused kernel, no explicit softmax materialization

use_cases.name: Apply Flex Attention with Block Mask
use_cases.trigger: Block constructed with use_flex_attention=True and flex_attn_block_mask
use_cases.benefit: Sparse/custom attention patterns (e.g., causal, sliding window) via compiled mask

use_cases.name: Configure Block Sequence via block_config
use_cases.mechanism: block_config string (e.g. 'FA-CA-MLP') → parsed → DITBuildingBlock per token
use_cases.note: MultiviewGeneralDIT adds n_views parameter and supports layer_mask to skip blocks

use_cases.name: Apply QK Normalization
use_cases.mechanism: q_norm and k_norm: RMSNorm(head_dim) applied before attention computation

inheritance_hierarchy: MemEffCrossAttentionFlash extends CrossAttention (overrides forward signature to accept pre-split q/k/v)
MemEffAttentionFlex extends nn.Module (independent, not from Attention)
MultiviewGeneralDIT extends GeneralDIT (reinitializes self.blocks with n_views support)
key_relationships: Block composes MemEffAttentionFlash OR MemEffAttentionFlex (selected at init)
DITBuildingBlock instantiates VideoAttention (TE-based) for fa/ca block types
GeneralDITTransformerBlock composes list of DITBuildingBlock from block_config string
MultiviewGeneralDIT composes GeneralDITTransformerBlock per block index (with optional layer_mask)
important_notes: Two parallel attention stacks: (1) src/models/utils/attention.py uses Flash/Flex backends; (2) cosmos_predict1 uses TransformerEngine DotProductAttention
block_config='FA-CA-MLP' is default for MultiviewGeneralDIT (full-attn → cross-attn → MLP per transformer block)
Training variant of GeneralDITTransformerBlock supports additional window/spatial/temporal attention types
MemEffCrossAttentionFlash.forward has a bug: uses self.to_q(v) instead of self.to_v(v) at line 263
flex_attn_func is compiled with torch.compile and may not be available on all platforms (guarded with try/except)
All attention classes support optional QK normalization via RMSNorm for training stability
